title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Capital Float - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Senior Software Engineer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
